acceptanceCriteria.text: User can complete a full speaking attempt via record or upload
Audio is stored in Supabase Storage and transcribed before scoring
Report covers fluency, pronunciation, lexical resource, and grammar
Transcription or scoring failure is handled safely with credit refund

snapshot.description: Speaking prompts by part (1/2/3). Audio record or upload. Transcription before scoring. Speaking-specific report covering fluency, pronunciation, lexical, and grammar.
snapshot.title: Module 4: Speaking practice
